task_completion.description: Configure the display layout to a 2x2 (Four-Up) grid
task_completion.visual_evidence: The central viewer area shows four distinct panels arranged in a 2x2 grid.

task_completion.description: Assign MRI sequences to the correct quadrants: TL=FLAIR, TR=T1, BL=T1ce, BR=T2
task_completion.visual_evidence: Panel headers or corner annotations identify the sequences: Top-Left as FLAIR, Top-Right as T1, Bottom-Left as T1ce (or T1_Contrast), and Bottom-Right as T2.

task_completion.description: Link views to synchronize slice position
task_completion.visual_evidence: The link/chain icon in the slice controller bars is active/depressed, or the crosshairs are visible and aligned at the exact same anatomical position across all four panels.

task_completion.description: Navigate to a slice clearly showing the tumor with appropriate window/level
task_completion.visual_evidence: The displayed slice shows a visible brain tumor (bright on FLAIR, enhancing on T1ce). The image contrast is adjusted so the brain structure is clearly visible, not too dark or washed out.

task_completion.description: Place a fiducial marker at the center of the tumor
task_completion.visual_evidence: A markup point (e.g., a star, cross, or dot labeled 'F-1' or similar) is visible in the viewer, positioned centrally within the tumor region.

task_completion.description: Verify creation of the screenshot, fiducial file, and JSON report
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file browser window, save dialog, or terminal listing shows 'multisequence_comparison.png', 'tumor_center.fcsv', and 'sequence_comparison_report.json' in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application GUI rather than command-line scripting for visualization
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 3D Slicer interface (menus, toolbars, module panels) being interacted with, rather than just a terminal window executing a script.

integrity.description: Verify the MRI images are rendered correctly
integrity.visual_evidence: The panels show actual anatomical MRI data, not blank screens, noise, or error messages.

integrity.description: Verify the report was not manually typed without analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: If the report creation is visible, it should occur after the visualization and markup steps, implying the data was derived from the observation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains sequences labeled FLAIR, T1, T1ce, and T2. The 'T1_Contrast' requirement corresponds to the 'T1ce' file/label. The tumor appears hyperintense (bright) on FLAIR and shows enhancement on T1ce.
